features.name: Baseline Harness And Google OAuth
features.description: A cookiecutter-style Django/Viewflow harness with custom email users, Google OAuth sign-in, Kisomo auth visuals, separated design-system CSS, and repeatable local verification.
features.evidence: Django scaffold, apps.users, auth templates, Kisomo-owned authenticated shell, static/dissertation CSS, image exports, init script, and preview helper are present. Verified with ./init.sh, python manage.py migrate --noinput, python manage.py test apps.users, python scripts/validate_json.py, a 200 OK response from /accounts/login/ on the local dev server, and a 302 Google OAuth redirect from /accounts/google/login/.

features.name: Reproducible Topic Brief Run
features.description: Restore the reviewed curriculum/topic-brief run workflow with preserved manifests and outputs.
features.evidence: Held for user review per rebuild plan.
